typography.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-black tracking-tighter text-[#1F4D2A]
typography.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-bold tracking-tight text-[#1F4D2A]

button.base: inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-full font-semibold transition-all duration-200 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#1F4D2A] focus:ring-offset-2
button.pill_cta: bg-[#D4E8C9] text-[#1F4D2A] rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-semibold hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-300 flex items-center gap-2

card.base: bg-white rounded-3xl border border-[#E8F3E4] shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-300 overflow-hidden

badge.base: inline-flex items-center rounded-full px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold bg-[#E8F3E4] text-[#1F4D2A]

marketing.hero: Full-bleed background image with centered text and CTA. Night soccer field image.
marketing.stats_band: Light mint-green (#D4E8C9) band below hero. 3-column grid for stats (20+ Recintos, 40+ Canchas, 90+ Reservas). Dark green bold outline icons.
marketing.featured_courts: Alternating left/right image-text layout cards. Pill buttons with ↗.
marketing.footer: Light green pastel background, multi-column navigation, app store badges placeholders.

dashboard.navigation: Sidebar for desktop, bottom tab or hamburger for mobile. High contrast active states.
dashboard.grid: Dense bento-box style for analytics, lists for reservations. Max 8px border radius for inner dashboard elements.
dashboard.cards: Flat background, 1px subtle border, no heavy shadows.

hero.description: Full-bleed stadium/field night photography for hero background.

instructions_to_main_agent.branding: Brand name 'OutSide'. Spanish UI labels exclusively.
instructions_to_main_agent.fonts: Import 'Outfit', 'Figtree', and 'Caveat' from Google Fonts. Do NOT use Inter or Roboto.
instructions_to_main_agent.testing: All interactive elements must include data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='reserve-court-button').
instructions_to_main_agent.icons: Use lucide-react. Prefer bold styling for stats section icons.
instructions_to_main_agent.components: Use Shadcn UI for dashboard elements (forms, tables, date pickers) but customize them to match the pastel green theme. For marketing pages, use raw HTML/Tailwind for creative freedom.
instructions_to_main_agent.data_models: Implement models for Usuario, Cancha, Local, Reserva, Torneo, Partido, Equipo, Descuento.
